"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion\CLion 2024.3.1.1\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Project2_DSA.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Project2_DSA.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Project2_DSA.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Project2_DSA.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Project2_DSA.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libProject2_DSA.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Project2_DSA.dir\linkLibs.rsp
